name: Vitrica
description: The sword the fabled Orokin executioner Nihil used to glass the condemned. Swing while Aim Gliding to glass enemies. A Ground Slam will smash nearby glassed foes, while sending forward a narrow shockwave to shatter distant ones. A Heavy Slam sends forth a wider shockwave with greater force.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The sword the fabled Orokin executioner Nihil used to glass the condemned. Swing while Aim Gliding to glass enemies. A Ground Slam will smash nearby glassed foes, while sending forward a narrow shockwave to shatter distant ones. A Heavy Slam sends forth a wider shockwave with greater force.

components.name: Orokin Cell
components.description:
Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

Location: Ceres, Saturn, and Deimos

components.name: Oxium
components.description:
Oxium is a rare lighter than air alloy of Orokin origin, used in certain Corpus Robotics.

Location: Venus, Jupiter, Mars, Neptune, Pluto, Eris, Europa, and Lua.

components.name: Purified Heciphron
components.description:
Extracted from the Infestation and cut into a prestigious gem.

Blueprint sold by Otak in the Necralisk on Deimos.

components.name: Tempered Bapholite
components.description:
Fused with its inert Infested tendrils into a durable alloy.

Blueprint sold by Otak in the Necralisk on Deimos.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of War: Banshee & Mirage Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.1.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Vitrica’s sound FX building up when turning many enemies to glass at the same time.

patchlogs.name: Star Days: Hotfix 29.8.1
patchlogs.changes: For those who did not originally fight Nihil during Glassmaker, using this Key route will grant you the Vitrica heavy blade. Tenno who have already acquired the Vitrica can enjoy an End of Mission Riven Mod reward!

patchlogs.name: Nightwave: Intermission III: Update 29.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Nihil may have been contained, but he is still a threatening presence… as well as the owner of a unique weapon. Players have asked how they may be able to repeat their fight with Nihil and acquire the Vitrica in the future

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ivara Navigator Vitrica projectiles traveling at top speed, instead of slowing down for more control.
